title: carya ovalis
intro: Carya ovalis, also known as the Japanese walnut or Japanese white walnut, is a deciduous tree species native to East Asia. The bark of Carya ovalis contains flavonoids and phenolic acids, which exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it a potential medicinal plant. The health benefits of Carya ovalis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and providing antioxidant protection. In herbal preparations, Carya ovalis can be used as a tea, tincture, or oil, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
